<section id="about" style="padding:0;margin:0">

  <div class="about-hero">
    <img class="hero-bg" src="data:image/png;base64," alt="House sparrows in rain"/>
    <div class="hero-overlay"></div>
    <div class="hero-text">
      <h1>About SingingSparrows</h1>
      <p>"Do you see this little bird looking at you? When was the last time you saw this bird?
      FYI… these are the house sparrows which is now red-listed as a species of high conservation concern."</p>
    </div>
  </div>

  <div class="pad bg-cream">
    <div class="who">
      <div class="who-text" data-reveal="left">
        <span class="who-subtitle">Our Story</span>
        <h2>Who We <em>Are</em></h2>
        <p>SingingSparrows is a conservation initiative dedicated to protecting and reviving the population of house sparrows — the tiny, cheerful birds that once filled our mornings with song.</p>
        <p>Once a common sight in every neighbourhood, the house sparrow has quietly disappeared from urban landscapes due to habitat loss, pesticide use, and the rapid transformation of our cities.</p>
        <p>We believe every neighbourhood deserves the gentle chirp of a sparrow. Our mission is to bring them back — one nest box at a time.</p>
      </div>
      <div class="who-visual" data-reveal="right">
        <img src="data:image/png;base64," alt="Sparrow on terracotta pot"/>
        <div class="badge">🐦 Protecting since 2018</div>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>

  <div class="pad bg-dark">
    <div class="sec-head" data-reveal="fade">
      <span class="eyebrow">What We Do</span>
      <h2 class="light">Our Mission</h2>
      <p class="light">Three pillars that drive everything we do for the house sparrow.</p>
    </div>
    <div class="mission-inner" data-stagger>
      <div class="mission-card">
        <div class="card-photo"><img src="data:image/png;base64," alt="Installing nest box"/></div>
        <div class="card-body">
          <span class="card-tag">Initiative</span>
          <div class="card-title">Nest Boxes</div>

        <span class="btag">Why it matters</span>
        <h2>House Sparrows — Bioindicators of the Environment</h2>
        <hr/>
        <p>Sparrows have been shown to be particularly useful as bioindicators because they are sensitive to pollutants and play an important role in the ecosystem. Their decline is a warning signal — when sparrows disappear, our environment is in trouble.</p>
      </div>

  <div class="pad bg-dark">
    <div class="sec-head" data-reveal="fade">
      <span class="eyebrow">Since 2013</span>
      <h2 class="light">Our Journey Through <em style="color:#c96a45">the Years</em></h2>
      <p class="light">A decade of dedication, one nest box at a time.</p>
    </div>
    <div class="timeline">

      <div class="tl-item" data-reveal="fade">
        <div class="tlc">
          <span class="tly">2013</span>
          <h4>The Spark</h4>
          <p>A small group of nature lovers in Chennai noticed the alarming disappearance of house sparrows from their neighbourhoods — and decided to act.</p>
        </div>
        <div class="tl-dot">🐦</div><div class="tle"></div>
      </div>

      <div class="tl-item" data-reveal="fade">
        <div class="tle"></div><div class="tl-dot">🏠</div>
        <div class="tlc">
          <span class="tly">2014</span>
          <h4>First Nest Boxes Built</h4>
          <p>Handcrafted the first batch of wooden nest boxes and installed them across homes and terraces in Chennai — sparrows responded almost immediately.</p>
        </div>
      </div>

      <div class="tl-item" data-reveal="fade">
        <div class="tlc">
          <span class="tly">2015</span>
          <h4>Community Grows</h4>
          <p>Word spread through neighbourhoods. Volunteers joined, donations came in, and 200+ boxes were installed. Schools began inviting us for awareness talks.</p>
        </div>
        <div class="tl-dot">🌱</div><div class="tle"></div>
      </div>

      <div class="tl-item" data-reveal="fade">
        <div class="tle"></div><div class="tl-dot">📢</div>
        <div class="tlc">
          <span class="tly">2016</span>
          <h4>Officially SingingSparrows</h4>
          <p>Formally registered as an NGO. Launched structured school outreach programs and partnered with local RWAs across Chennai to scale nest box placement.</p>
        </div>
      </div>

      <div class="tl-item" data-reveal="fade">
        <div class="tlc">
          <span class="tly">2017</span>
          <h4>500 Boxes Milestone</h4>
          <p>Crossed 500 nest boxes installed. Began tracking sparrow return rates — early data showed nesting activity in 60% of placed boxes within the first season.</p>
        </div>
        <div class="tl-dot">🎯</div><div class="tle"></div>
      </div>

      <div class="tl-item" data-reveal="fade">
        <div class="tle"></div><div class="tl-dot">🌐</div>
        <div class="tlc">
          <span class="tly">2018</span>
          <h4>Digital Campaign Launch</h4>
          <p>Social media campaigns went viral. Thousands of Chennaites pledged to place nest boxes. Coverage in national newspapers and regional TV channels.</p>
        </div>
      </div>

      <div class="tl-item" data-reveal="fade">
        <div class="tlc">
          <span class="tly">2019</span>
          <h4>Beyond Chennai</h4>
          <p>Expanded to 10+ cities across Tamil Nadu. Partnered with eco-clubs in colleges. Conducted India's first Sparrow Count citizen science event in Chennai.</p>
        </div>
        <div class="tl-dot">🗺️</div><div class="tle"></div>
      </div>

      <div class="tl-item" data-reveal="fade">
        <div class="tle"></div><div class="tl-dot">💪</div>
        <div class="tlc">
          <span class="tly">2020</span>
          <h4>Resilience Through Pandemic</h4>
          <p>Despite COVID-19, volunteers safely home-delivered nest box kits with assembly guides. Online workshops kept the mission alive — 800 boxes placed that year.</p>
        </div>
      </div>

      <div class="tl-item" data-reveal="fade">
        <div class="tlc">
          <span class="tly">2021</span>
          <h4>1000 Boxes in One Day 🏆</h4>
          <p>Our greatest milestone — 1,000 nest boxes distributed across Chennai in a single day on February 20, celebrating 8 years of the movement.</p>
        </div>
        <div class="tl-dot">🏆</div><div class="tle"></div>
      </div>

      <div class="tl-item" data-reveal="fade">
        <div class="tle"></div><div class="tl-dot">🔬</div>
        <div class="tlc">
          <span class="tly">2022</span>
          <h4>Research & Documentation</h4>
          <p>Collaborated with ornithologists to document sparrow return patterns. Published findings shared with the Tamil Nadu Forest Department and BNHS.</p>
        </div>
      </div>

      <div class="tl-item" data-reveal="fade">
        <div class="tlc">
          <span class="tly">2023</span>
          <h4>2,000+ Boxes & 18 Cities</h4>
          <p>Crossed 2,000 nest boxes across 18 cities. Launched the DIY Nest Box Kit program — citizens build their own from recycled materials guided by our team.</p>
        </div>
        <div class="tl-dot">🌟</div><div class="tle"></div>
      </div>

      <div class="tl-item" data-reveal="fade">
        <div class="tle"></div><div class="tl-dot">🕊️</div>
        <div class="tlc">
          <span class="tly">2024</span>
          <h4>12 Years Strong</h4>
          <p>2,400+ nest boxes. 12,000+ volunteers. 18+ cities. The chirping is slowly returning to Chennai's mornings — and we're just getting started.</p>
        </div>
      </div>

    </div></div>

  <div class="pad bg-coral">

<script data-cfasync="false" src="/cdn-cgi/scripts/5c5dd728/cloudflare-static/email-decode.min.js"></script><script>
  /* ── SMOOTH SCROLL for nav links ── */
  document.querySelectorAll('a[href^="#"], .nav-drawer a').forEach(a => {
    a.addEventListener('click', e => {
      const href = a.getAttribute('href');
      if (href && href.startsWith('#')) {
        e.preventDefault();
        const target = document.getElementById(href.slice(1));
        if (target) {
          const top = target.getBoundingClientRect().top + window.scrollY - 68;
          window.scrollTo({ top, behavior: 'smooth' });
        }
      }
    });
  });

  /* ── SCROLL PROGRESS BAR ── */
  const bar = document.getElementById('scroll-progress');
  function updateProgress() {
    const scrolled = window.scrollY;
    const total = document.body.scrollHeight - window.innerHeight;
    bar.style.width = (scrolled / total * 100) + '%';
  }

  /* ── ACTIVE NAV on scroll ── */
  const sections = ['home','about','achievement','contact'];
  const navEls   = {};
  sections.forEach(id => navEls[id] = document.getElementById('nl-' + id));
  const navEl = document.querySelector('nav');

  function onScroll() {
    const y = window.scrollY + 100;

    // Nav shrink
    navEl.classList.toggle('scrolled', window.scrollY > 40);

    // Active section
    let cur = 'home';
    sections.forEach(id => {
      const el = document.getElementById(id);
      if (el && el.getBoundingClientRect().top + window.scrollY - 80 <= y) cur = id;
    });
    sections.forEach(id => {
      if (navEls[id]) navEls[id].classList.toggle('active', id === cur);
    });

    // Progress
    updateProgress();

    // Parallax hero
    const heroImg = document.querySelector('.about-hero img.hero-bg');
    if (heroImg) {
      const heroEl = document.querySelector('.about-hero');
      const rect = heroEl.getBoundingClientRect();
      if (rect.top < window.innerHeight && rect.bottom > 0) {
        heroImg.style.transform = `translateY(${rect.top * 0.15}px)`;
      }
    }

    // Timeline dots pulse
    document.querySelectorAll('.tl-dot').forEach(dot => {
      const r = dot.getBoundingClientRect();
      dot.classList.toggle('in-view', r.top < window.innerHeight * 0.85 && r.bottom > 0);
    });
  }

  window.addEventListener('scroll', onScroll, { passive: true });
  onScroll();

  /* ── INTERSECTION OBSERVER for reveal animations ── */
  const revealObs = new IntersectionObserver((entries) => {
    entries.forEach(entry => {
      if (entry.isIntersecting) {
        entry.target.classList.add('revealed');
        revealObs.unobserve(entry.target);
      }
    });
  }, { threshold: 0.12, rootMargin: '0px 0px -40px 0px' });

  document.querySelectorAll('[data-reveal], [data-stagger]').forEach(el => revealObs.observe(el));

  /* ── COUNTER ANIMATION ── */
  function animateCounter(el) {
    const target = el.textContent.replace(/[^0-9]/g,'');
    const suffix = el.textContent.replace(/[0-9]/g,'').trim();
    if (!target) return;
    const num = parseInt(target);
    const duration = 1600;
    const start = performance.now();
    function update(now) {
      const t = Math.min((now - start) / duration, 1);
      const ease = 1 - Math.pow(1 - t, 3);
      el.textContent = Math.floor(ease * num).toLocaleString() + suffix;
      if (t < 1) requestAnimationFrame(update);
    }
    requestAnimationFrame(update);
  }

  const counterObs = new IntersectionObserver((entries) => {
    entries.forEach(entry => {
      if (entry.isIntersecting) {
        animateCounter(entry.target);
        counterObs.unobserve(entry.target);
      }
    });
  }, { threshold: 0.5 });

  document.querySelectorAll('.snum, .spnum').forEach(el => counterObs.observe(el));

  /* ── NAV MENU ── */
  function toggleMenu() { document.getElementById('drawer').classList.toggle('open'); }
  function closeMenu()  { document.getElementById('drawer').classList.remove('open'); }
  document.addEventListener('click', e => {
    const d = document.getElementById('drawer');
    const h = document.querySelector('.hamburger');
    if (d && h && !d.contains(e.target) && !h.contains(e.target)) d.classList.remove('open');
  });

  /* ── QR MODAL ── */
  function openQRModal(e) {
    if(e) e.preventDefault();
    document.getElementById('qr-overlay').classList.add('open');
    document.body.classList.add('modal-open');
  }
  function closeQRModal() {
    document.getElementById('qr-overlay').classList.remove('open');
    document.body.classList.remove('modal-open');
  }
  function closeQR(e) {
    // close only if clicking backdrop, not modal itself
    if (e.target === document.getElementById('qr-overlay')) closeQRModal();
  }
  // Close on Escape key
  document.addEventListener('keydown', e => {
    if (e.key === 'Escape') closeQRModal();
  });
</script>
